We agreed that unlocking the EU funds earmarked for the Hungarian people, but frozen due to the previous government’s corruption, is the top priority. The new government will take the key political decisions on how to unlock and invest these funds, in line with the clear mandate of the Hungarian people last Sunday. The Commission will work closely with us to meet the extremely tight deadline and deliver results. tweet

↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇹🇻🇦🇺🇸 "The statements, particularly about the Pope, were unacceptable. I have expressed and continue to express my solidarity with the Pope." - Italian PM, Giorgia Meloni, comments on Trump attacking the Pope. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇹 "Do Italians like the fact that your prime minister isn't giving us any help to get oil?" - we can add Meloni to the long list of people Donald Trump has beef with. In a phone call with Corriere della Sera Trump asked "Do people like her? I can't imagine. I'm shocked by her. I thought she was brave, but I was wrong." Did you talk to her about this? "No. She simply says Italy doesn't want to get involved. Even though Italy gets its oil from there, even though America is very important to Italy, she doesn't think Italy should be involved. She thinks America should do the work for him." Regarding the Pope, Giorgia Meloni said that what you said was unacceptable. "It's her who's unacceptable, because she doesn't care if Iran has a nuclear weapon and would blow up Italy in two minutes if they had the chance." But did you talk about these things? "No..." Haven't you spoken even once this month? "No, we haven't spoken in a long time." Why? "Because she doesn't want to help us with NATO, she doesn't want to help us get rid of nuclear weapons. It's very different from what I thought." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Russian officials fear Mossad could intensify anti-Russian operations under his leadership. Gofman is described as being of Belarusian Jewish origin. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇶 ☀️ 🇮🇷 A drone strike targeted Iranian-Kurdish opposition bases in the town of Koya near Degalla in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq. Coalition fighters had sortied from Erbil to intercept the drones, with one being successfully intercepted and the other seen impacting. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that paratrooper forces eliminated a militant cell in Bint Jbeil responsible for wounding 10 soldiers overnight during a close-quarters firefight. According to details, the cell was inside a building when paratroopers entered, at which point the militants emerged from a stairwell and opened fire. With the support of tank fire and airstrikes, two of the militants were killed. A third member of the cell attempted to flee but was later targeted and eliminated in an airstrike. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz said that on Holocaust Remembrance Day, Israel is stronger and safer, and for the first time in many years is not threatened with annihilation. He stated that operations "Rising Lion" and “Roaring Lion” destroyed Iran’s nuclear weapons production capability. “The enriched material could serve as a basis for an attempt to restart the project, and therefore the U.S. and Israel have defined the removal of the material from Iran as a precondition for ending the campaign,” Katz said. He added that Iran’s proxies, including the collapsed Syrian government of Bashar al-Assad, Hezbollah and Hamas, have been severely weakened. He thanked Prime Minister Netanyahu and U.S. President Trump. @wfwitness
Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: The United States and Israel have defined the removal of enriched material from Iran as a precondition for ending the campaign.

Sanctioned Chinese Tanker Breaks U.S. Naval Blockade on Hormuz Sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry transited the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, carrying 250,000 barrels of methanol - the first known passage since the U.S. Naval blockade began. Beijing called the blockade dangerous & irresponsible. READ MORE
